headline: Watts Water's Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
summary: WTS posted record Q1 sales and earnings as data center demand, pricing and productivity gains fueled margin expansion.

headline: CRUS Q4 Earnings & Sales Top, Up Y/Y as Diversification Gains Momentum
summary: Cirrus Logic beat fiscal Q4 2026 EPS estimates as smartphone demand, PC growth and expansion into new silicon categories fueled fiscal 2026 revenue growth.
